holdings.infoBox: FDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are Jefferies Financial Group stock at 2.31%, Citigroup at 2.18%, Williams-Sonoma at 2.14%, Millicom International Cellular at 2.13%, and Gentex at 2.10%.

overview.description: The MarketDesk Focused U.S. Dividend ETF (FDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in US companies that are forecasted to raise their dividends. The fund constructs its portfolio using a quantitative dividend screening methodology with the goal of generating above-average income FDIV was launched on Sep 19, 2023 and is issued by MarketDesk.
